title: smilax oxyphylla
intro: Smilax oxyphylla is a species of flowering plant in the Smilacaceae family, commonly known as the Chinese sarsaparilla or Chinese smilax. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Smilax oxyphylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve kidney function, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Smilax oxyphylla is often used to make herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
